mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, class_id, week_no, week_day, start_time, end_time, location FROM course_schedule WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT cs.id AS schedule_id, cs.course_id, cs.class_id, ci.course_name, cs.week_day, TIME_FORMAT(cs.start_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS start_time, TIME_FORMAT(cs.end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS end_time, cs.location FROM course_schedule cs INNER JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = cs.course_id INNER JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.class_id = cs.class_id WHERE sp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cs.week_day ASC, cs.start_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_schedule (course_id, class_id, week_no, week_day, start_time, end_time, location) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{classId}, #{weekNo}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_schedule SET course_id = #{courseId}, class_id = #{classId}, week_no = #{weekNo}, week_day = #{weekDay}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location} WHERE id = #{id}
